payment.terms:
If you cancel the booking up to 24 hours before the meeting time, you will be entitled to a full refund. If you cancel the booking less than 24 hours before the meeting time, you will not be entitled to a refund. 

If you reschedule the booking up to 24 hours before the meeting time, you will not be charged a reschedule fee. If you reschedule the booking less than 24 hours before the meeting time, your reschedule fee will be $20.00 USD.

questions_and_answers.answer: I bought a new house the flooring upstairs is carpet but it's a 120 year old house and I found pine wood underneath.  I wanted to get estimate on how much it would be to sand / stain / seal it etc.
questions_and_answers.question: Please share anything that will help prepare for our meeting.
